error_signature: Puppeteer node not opening visible browser
title: Puppeteer node not opening in headful mode
symptom: The Puppeteer node does not open a visible browser window for manual interaction when running workflows that require CAPTCHA solving.
not_this_if: Running n8n as a Windows Service
root_cause: The Puppeteer node defaults to headless mode, which does not display a browser window. To interact with CAPTCHA challenges, the node must be configured to run in headful mode, which requires specific launch options and an interactive session.
fix_steps: Open the Puppeteer node’s settings in n8n.
In the 'Launch Options' field, enter: { 'headless': false, 'devtools': true }
Ensure n8n is started from a normal Command Prompt or PowerShell, not as a Windows Service.
agent_instruction: Configure the Puppeteer node to run in headful mode and ensure n8n is started in an interactive session.
